Catalog/ENT/Mesire Sinus Balloon Catheter System
👂 ENT SolutionsREF: MRL-ENT-001

Mesire Sinus Balloon Catheter System

MESIRE · Balloon Catheters

Non-compliant balloon catheter for controlled sinus ostia dilation. Guide catheters with multiple angles and light wire for accurate sinus localization in chronic sinusitis.

MaterialMedical Grade Polymer
Frequently Asked Questions

Non-compliant balloon catheter for controlled sinus ostia dilation. Guide catheters with multiple angles and light wire for accurate sinus localization in chronic sinusitis.

This product is manufactured by Meril Life Sciences and is distributed by Agile Healthcare across all districts of Telangana.

Yes, all Meril Life Sciences products distributed by Agile Healthcare, including the Mesire Sinus Balloon Catheter System, strictly adhere to CDSCO guidelines and ISO 13485:2016 quality standards.

The Mesire Sinus Balloon Catheter System is constructed using Medical Grade Polymer, ensuring high biocompatibility and durability.
